## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ChartColumnIncreasing;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ChartColumnIncreasing { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
statistics, analytics, diagram, graph, trending up

## Categories
charts
